page_metadata.biotools__summary: Automated template-derived brain extraction in animal MRI | atlasBREX: Automated averaged template-derived brain extraction in animal MRI | Copy all gzipped (.nii.gz) NIFTI volumes and atlasBREX.sh into a common folder. There should be no directory or file containing 'orig', 'temp' or '_.nii.gz' in this folder
